mapper.select:
SELECT f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.reply_cnt,
m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, m.birthday,
mp.saved_name AS profileImage, mp.file_path AS profilePath,
COUNT(fl_all.like_id) AS likeCnt,
CASE WHEN fl_me.like_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked
FROM feed f
JOIN member m ON f.username = m.username
LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON f.username = mp.username
LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_all ON f.feed_id = fl_all.feed_id
LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_me ON f.feed_id = fl_me.feed_id
WHERE f.deleted = 0
GROUP BY f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.deleted, f.reply_cnt,
m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color,
mp.saved_name, mp.file_path,
fl_me.like_id
ORDER BY f.feed_id DESC
SELECT feed_content FROM feed WHERE feed_id = #{feedId}
SELECT count(*) FROM feed WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE feed SET deleted=1 WHERE feed_id=#{feedId}
UPDATE feed SET feed_content = #{feedContent} WHERE feed_id=#{feedId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM feed_like WHERE feed_id=#{feedId} AND username=#{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feed_like( feed_id, username ) VALUES ( #{feedId}, #{username} )
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM feed_like WHERE feed_id=#{feedId}

SELECT f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.reply_cnt,
m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color, m.birthday,
mp.saved_name AS profileImage, mp.file_path AS profilePath,
COUNT(fl_all.like_id) AS likeCnt,
CASE WHEN fl_me.like_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked
FROM feed f
JOIN member m ON f.username = m.username
LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON f.username = mp.username
LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_all ON f.feed_id = fl_all.feed_id
LEFT JOIN feed_like fl_me ON f.feed_id = fl_me.feed_id
WHERE f.deleted = 0
GROUP BY f.feed_id, f.username, f.feed_content, f.created_at, f.deleted, f.reply_cnt,
m.nickname, m.skin_type, m.personal_color,
mp.saved_name, mp.file_path,
fl_me.like_id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN f.feed_id = #{feedId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, f.feed_id DESC
